violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the interior of 1 door freezer has an accumulation stagnant water and soil residue. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

Hot dogs were observed held at 95-98 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food facility of origin was contacted during time of inspection to assess for food cook time. Caterer arrived on site during time of inspection to reheat foods. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the kitchen and at the front entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment serves a high risk population, hot holds and serves food. Establishment shall have a licensed food safety manager on sight when food is being hot held and served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2023

Refrigerator door gasket and door on Milk Chest (lower door) was observed to be in poor repair. An excessive amount of ice buildup was observed in Milk Chest. Lower gasket and door shall be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2024
